summary: Completed comprehensive mobile responsiveness testing for Jolly's Kafe admin pages at 375px viewport. All 20 test cases passed with no horizontal overflow issues. Mobile-friendly features verified: hamburger sidebar navigation, responsive stat cards, mobile card views for menu items and transactions, stacking price fields in modals, and proper filter bar wrapping.
passed_tests: Admin login works on mobile (375px)
Admin Dashboard - no horizontal overflow
Hamburger menu button visible on mobile
Mobile sidebar overlay present behind slide-in navigation
Sidebar X close button present
All 6 nav items accessible in sidebar
Dashboard stat cards stacking properly
Admin Menu Management - no horizontal overflow
Menu items mobile card view present (md:hidden)
Menu category pills wrapping properly
Add Menu Item modal - price fields stack vertically on mobile (grid-cols-1)
Add Menu Item modal is scrollable
Admin Orders - no horizontal overflow
Admin Orders filter bar wrapping properly
Admin Site Settings - no horizontal overflow
Site Settings - wallet toggle visible for all locations
Site Settings - ordering toggle visible for all locations
Site Settings - delete button in card header for all locations
Add Location form renders properly on mobile
Resident Balance - no horizontal overflow
Resident Balance - summary cards in 2-col grid
Resident Balance - search/filter stack on mobile
Resident Balance - resident cards in single column on mobile
Transaction Report - no horizontal overflow
Transaction Report - mobile card layout for transactions (md:hidden)
Public Menu Catalog - no horizontal overflow
Public Menu Catalog - location selector present
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile responsiveness testing completed at 375px viewport. All admin pages render correctly without horizontal overflow. Key mobile features verified: (1) Hamburger sidebar navigation with overlay and X close button, (2) Dashboard stat cards stack vertically, (3) Menu Management shows mobile card view for items, (4) Add Menu Item modal price fields stack vertically, (5) Site Settings controls use flex-wrap with delete button in card header, (6) Orders filter bar wraps properly, (7) Resident Balance summary cards in 2-col grid with resident cards in single column, (8) Transaction Report uses mobile card layout instead of table, (9) Public Menu Catalog location selector works on mobile.

mobile_sidebar.hamburger_button: Working - visible on mobile, hidden on desktop (lg:hidden)
mobile_sidebar.overlay: Working - fixed inset-0 bg-black/40 behind sidebar
mobile_sidebar.close_button: Working - X button in sidebar header

admin_dashboard.stat_cards: Working - stack vertically on mobile (grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4)
admin_dashboard.recent_orders: Working - name stacks below order number on mobile

admin_menu.mobile_card_view: Working - md:hidden shows card layout instead of table

add_menu_modal.price_fields: Working - grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3 for vertical stacking
